children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The corporation shall submit to Congress an annual report describing the activities of the corporation during the preceding fiscal year.

children.heading: .—Submittal Date
children.label: b .—Submittal Date
children.text: Each annual report under this section shall be submitted at the same time as the report of the audit of the corporation required by section 10101(b).

children.heading: .—Report Not Public Document
children.label: c .—Report Not Public Document
children.text: No annual report under this section shall be printed as a public document.
